A '''[[Chief Justice]]''' was the head of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Supreme Court/Legends|Supreme Court]] as of [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]. He heard the corruption case against [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]] brought by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Bail Antilles/Legends|Bail Antilles]], and presumably presided over the four trials of [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]].

{{Char-stub}}
